name: Renrui Human Resources Technology Holdings Limited
summary: Renrui Human Resources Technology Holdings Limited, an investment holding company, provides staffing services in China. The company operates through Flexible Staffing, Professional Recruitment, BPO, and Other HR Solutions segments. It operates online to offline recruitment platform in flexible staffing market. The company offers talent outsourcing; senior talent management; and professional recruitment services. It also provides business process outsourcing services, such as performance management, operations management, training management, information security, and scheduling management, as well as corporate training services. The company was founded in 2010 and is headquartered in Chengdu, China.
